home.title: YouTube Chapter Timestamp Formatter — Auto Validate 0:00 Rule
home.description: Convert free-form timestamps (1m30s, 01:30, etc.) to YouTube chapter format and validate 0:00 start, 10-second gap, 3+ chapters, ascending order rules in real time.
home.lead: Paste free-form timestamps and get YouTube-compliant chapter format + real-time rule violation detection.
home.passAll: ✅ All YouTube chapter rules passed. Paste directly into the description.
home.guideAndFaq: For YouTube chapter rules, see Guide; for frequently asked questions, see FAQ.

guide.title: YouTube Chapter Rules Guide — 0:00 · 10s Gap · 3+ Chapters
guide.description: For YouTube chapters to be recognized in the description, all 5 rules must be met: 0:00 start, 10s+ gap, 3+ chapters, ascending order, colon format.
guide.lead: YouTube only activates chapters when the description contains a timestamp list that satisfies all the following rules.

faq.title: YouTube Chapter FAQ — Activation Conditions, Shorts, Emoji, URL Recognition
faq.description: 10 frequently asked questions about why chapters don't activate, long video formatting, Shorts support, emoji usage, and chapter count limits.
